channel.title: GitHub, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by GitHub, Inc. (github_m).

item.title: CVE-2026-46684 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DataEase: Unauthorized Command Execution Vulnerability
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase enterprise token handling can let TokenFilter#doFilter() pass X-DE-TOKEN values to TokenUtils.validate(), which checks only token presence and length before u…

item.title: CVE-2026-45320 · 8.7 HIGH — DataEase Data Dashboard SqlVariable transFilter Unfiltered SQL Injection
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase dashboard SQL variables such as ${deptId} are processed by SqlparserUtils.transFilter(), whose final branch returns raw user input for non-in and non-between…

item.title: CVE-2026-45535 · 8.7 HIGH — DataEase: Stored SQL Injection Vulnerability
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase SQL-type datasets store attacker-controlled SQL variable defaultValue entries such as ${var} and SqlparserUtils.handleVariableDefaultValue() inserts them with…

item.title: CVE-2026-45533 · 8.3 HIGH — DataEase: Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase export-center deletion can accept path traversal sequences such as ../ in the bulk delete API endpoint and pass attacker-controlled identifiers to ExportCente…

item.title: CVE-2026-50124 · 7.1 HIGH — DataEase: Remote Code Execution (RCE) via Zip Protocol & File Dropper
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase can be exploited by uploading payload.zip through the Excel upload API /datasource/upload, creating an H2 datasource that uses the zip: protocol, and executin…

item.title: CVE-2026-50030 · 7.1 HIGH — DataEase: Arbitrary SQL execution in preview path (direct data disclosure)
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase SQL preview exposes DatasetDataApi.previewSql/previewSqlCheck through /de2api/datasetData/previewSql, accepts PreviewSqlDTO.sql, PreviewSqlDTO.datasourceId, a…

item.title: CVE-2026-45419 · 8.5 HIGH — DataEase: Arbitrary File Write Vulnerability
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase template saves call TemplateManageService#save, StaticResourceServer#saveFilesToServe, and the /de2api/templateManage/save endpoint with attacker-controlled s…

item.title: CVE-2026-45417 · 8.7 HIGH — DataEase: SQL injection vulnerability
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase datasource connection status checks concatenate configuration.getSchema() into getTablesSql and execute the resulting SQL with executeQuery in io.dataease.dat…

item.title: CVE-2026-45534 · 9 CRITICAL — DataEase: RCE Vulnerability
item.description: DataEase is an open source data visualization and analysis tool. Prior to 2.10.23, DataEase Redshift datasource connections can load attacker-controlled rsjdbc.ini configuration from System.getProperty("java.io.tmpdir"), setting socketFactory=org.spr…

item.title: CVE-2026-56743 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Cilium may unexpectedly allow ingress traffic from the local namespace when a Kubernetes NetworkPolicy is configured with an ipBlock match
item.description: Cilium is a networking, observability, and security solution. From 1.19.0 to 1.19.4, standard Kubernetes NetworkPolicy specifications using CIDR-based ipBlock rules without pod or namespace selectors erroneously generate a wildcard namespace allow ru…

item.title: CVE-2026-56742 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Cilium: Namespaced HTTPRoutes can redirect traffic to other namespaces
item.description: Cilium is a networking, observability, and security solution. Prior to 1.17.17, 1.18.11, and 1.19.5, Cilium clusters using Gateway API allow users with permissions to create or update namespaced HTTPRoutes to mirror HTTP traffic to any Service in any…

item.title: CVE-2026-49445 · 9.2 CRITICAL — Cilium: Sensitive information disclosure and cluster disruption via local Envoy admin socket access
item.description: Cilium is a networking, observability, and security solution. Prior to 1.17.14, 1.18.8, and 1.19.2, when Cilium L7 functionality is enabled, the embedded or standalone Envoy instance creates a world-accessible admin.sock on cluster nodes, allowing a…

item.title: CVE-2026-62353 · 5.4 MEDIUM — TDengine: Authenticated Out-of-Bounds Read in SQL Lexer tGetToken
item.description: TDengine is a time-series database optimized for Internet of Things devices. Prior to 3.4.1.14, source/libs/parser/src/parTokenizer.c tGetToken() incremented past a trailing backslash in a SQL string literal such as 'abc\ and read one byte beyond the…

item.title: CVE-2026-62351 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — TDengine: Unauthenticated Remote Denial of Service via Out-of-Bounds Read in transDecompressMsg
item.description: TDengine is a time-series database optimized for Internet of Things devices. Prior to 3.4.1.15, source/libs/transport/src/transComm.c transDecompressMsg() read STransCompMsg.contLen when pHead->comp == 1 without first validating that the RPC packet c…

item.title: CVE-2026-62348 · 5.4 MEDIUM — TDengine: KILL SSMIGRATE missing authorization lets low-privilege users interrupt shared-storage migrations
item.description: TDengine is a time-series database optimized for Internet of Things devices. Prior to 3.4.1.15, TDengine Enterprise allowed an authenticated low-privilege SQL user to run KILL SSMIGRATE <id> against an active shared-storage migration because mndProce…

item.title: CVE-2026-62349 · 8.3 HIGH — TDengine: Off-by-One Buffer Overflow
item.description: TDengine is an open source, time-series database optimized for Internet of Things devices. In 3.4.1.6 and earlier, source/libs/parser/src/parUtil.c trimString() checks space for only one byte before processing SQL string escape sequences \%, \_, or \…

item.title: CVE-2026-62350 · 7.2 HIGH — TDengine: UDF lead to RCE
item.description: TDengine is an open source, time-series database optimized for Internet of Things devices. Prior to 3.4.1.15, a user with create udf privilege could upload a crafted shared library and install it as a user-defined function, such as eval, then execute…

item.title: CVE-2026-46421 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Supply chain compromise via malicious package versions (@cap-js/sqlite, @cap-js/postgres, @cap-js/db-service)
item.description: The SAP Cloud Application Programming Model is a tool for building enterprise-grade cloud applications, and cap-js/cds-dbs is the monorepo for SQL database services for that tool. On April 29, 2026, compromised versions of `@cap-js/sqlite@2.2.2`, `@c…

item.title: CVE-2026-62355 · 5.4 MEDIUM — TDengine: Standard User permission unexpect
item.description: TDengine is an open source, time-series database optimized for Internet of Things devices. Prior to 3.4.1.15, a Data Reader admin_user on a TDengine Cloud DB instance could run create udf even though standard users should have read-only permissions f…

item.title: CVE-2026-54443 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Dashy: Improper Neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tags in a Web Page (Basic XSS)
item.description: Dashy is a self-hostable personal dashboard. From 1.9.4 until 3.2.0, the Dashy RSS Widget in src/components/Widgets/RssFeed.vue does not sanitize RSS item link values before rendering feed item titles and Read More links as anchor href attributes, al…

item.title: CVE-2026-46485 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Dash: Users can write to config despire permissions (OIDC tested)
item.description: Dashy is a self-hostable personal dashboard. Prior to 4.0.8, Dashy deployments using OIDC can allow unauthenticated users or non-admin authenticated users to write changes to the main config.yaml through the config-saving functionality despite config…

item.title: CVE-2026-49987 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Repomix: Command Injection (RCE) via `--remote-branch` Argument Injection
item.description: Repomix is a tool that packs repositories into AI-friendly files. Prior to 1.14.1, src/core/git/gitCommand.ts execGitShallowClone passes the --remote-branch value directly to git fetch and git checkout without validation or --end-of-options, allowing…

item.title: CVE-2026-49988 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Repomix: attach_packed_output can bypass file-read secret scanning for supported local files
item.description: Repomix is a tool that packs repositories into AI-friendly files. Prior to 1.14.1, the Repomix MCP server attach_packed_output and read_repomix_output flow can register and read arbitrary local .json, .txt, .md, or .xml files without the file_system_…

item.title: CVE-2026-62947 · 4.9 MEDIUM — OpenWrt: ACL bypass and arbitrary root file read via cgi-io cgi-download
item.description: OpenWrt is a Linux operating system targeting embedded devices. Prior to 25.12.5, the cgi-download handler in cgi-io authorizes the requested path against the caller's ubus session file ACL before canonicalization, and rpcd session.c uses fnmatch() w…

item.title: CVE-2026-62948 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OpenWrt odhcpd/LuCI: unauthenticated DHCPv6 client can inject lease-file lines via FQDN hostname → stored XSS in the LuCI admin UI
item.description: OpenWrt is a Linux operating system targeting embedded devices. Prior to 25.12.5, odhcpd writes a DHCPv6 client FQDN option 39 hostname into /tmp/odhcpd.leases through src/statefiles.c statefiles_write_state6() and statefiles_write_state4() without e…

item.title: CVE-2026-53517 · 8.1 HIGH — Better Auth OAuth Provider: Refresh Token Rotation Race Condition Allows Concurrent Replay and Token Family Forking
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. From 1.4.8-beta.7 until 1.6.11, the @better-auth/oauth-provider POST /oauth2/token endpoint on the refresh_token grant performs a non-atomic read, validate, revoke, and mint s…

item.title: CVE-2026-45337 · 7.6 HIGH — Better Auth: Device authorization approve and deny accept any authenticated session while the user code is pending
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. From 1.6.0 until 1.6.11, the deviceAuthorization plugin treats any authenticated session as the owner of any pending device code because GET /device does not claim the row and…

item.title: CVE-2026-53514 · 7.7 HIGH — Better Auth: Unauthorized invitation acceptance via unverified email match in organization plugin
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. Prior to 1.6.11, and in 1.6.14 and later when invitation IDs can be obtained outside the invited mailbox and requireEmailVerificationOnInvitation: true is not enabled, the org…

item.title: CVE-2026-53515 · 7.1 HIGH — Better Auth: Privilege escalation via SSO provider registration: missing admin role check in @better-auth/sso
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. From 1.2.10 until 1.6.11, the @better-auth/sso plugin's POST /sso/register endpoint lets any organization member attach a new SSO provider to that organization because registe…

item.title: CVE-2026-53512 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Better Auth: OAuth refresh-token replay via missing client authentication on oidc-provider and mcp plugins
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. Prior to 1.6.11, the legacy oidcProvider and mcp plugins expose OAuth token endpoints whose refresh_token grant authenticates only possession of the bound refreshToken row and…

item.title: CVE-2026-53518 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Better Auth OAuth Provider: Race Condition in Authorization Code Exchange Enables Multi-Use Code Redemption
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. From 1.6.0 until 1.6.11, the @better-auth/oauth-provider POST /oauth2/token endpoint for the authorization_code grant redeems a single-use authorization code through a non-ato…

item.title: CVE-2026-53513 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Better Auth: Server-side request forgery via unvalidated OIDC endpoints on @better-auth/sso provider registration
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. Prior to 1.6.11, the @better-auth/sso plugin's POST /sso/register and POST /sso/update-provider endpoints accept attacker-controlled oidcConfig.userInfoEndpoint, tokenEndpoint…

item.title: CVE-2026-53516 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Better Auth: Account takeover via OAuth auto-link to unverified pre-registered email
item.description: Better Auth is an authentication and authorization library for TypeScript. Prior to 1.6.11, Better Auth's OAuth callback auto-link gate in handleOAuthUserInfo accepts implicit account linking when the OAuth provider asserts email_verified: true witho…

item.title: CVE-2026-61643 · 5.9 MEDIUM — FastGPT: workflow runtime can execute another user's private HTTP toolset
item.description: FastGPT is a knowledge-based AI application platform. From 4.14.17 until 4.15.0-beta5, an authenticated FastGPT user can save a workflow node that points to another user's private HTTP toolset by using a crafted saved tool id such as http-<victim_too…

item.title: CVE-2026-50562 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — FastGPT: Untrusted PR artifacts are pushed and deployed by privileged preview workflows
item.description: FastGPT is a knowledge-based AI application platform. At commit 22ebfacbb43311e9b73294040ae0eb87390c6bba and earlier, artifacts built from untrusted pull request code in .github/workflows/preview-docs-build.yml and .github/workflows/preview-fastgpt-b…

item.title: CVE-2026-62378 · 9 CRITICAL — RustFS Console: Critical Stored XSS in Preview Modal leading to Administrative Account Takeover
item.description: RustFS Console is a web management console for the RustFS distributed file system. From 0.1.7 until 0.1.10, the RustFS Console components/object/preview-modal.tsx and components/object/pdf-viewer.tsx extension-based PDF preview path can render HTML c…

item.title: CVE-2025-32781 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Apollo: Apollo Portal release endpoint allows cross-application configuration disclosure via releaseId
item.description: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system suitable for microservice configuration management scenarios. Prior to 2.5.0, Apollo Portal does not verify application and namespace permissions when an authenticated user requests a release by ID…

item.title: CVE-2026-59954 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apollo ConfigService access key authentication bypass via appId parsing and non-canonical matching
item.description: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system suitable for microservice configuration management scenarios. Prior to 2.5.2, Apollo ConfigService may allow unauthorized access to configuration data when AccessKey or management key authenticatio…

item.title: CVE-2026-59955 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apollo ConfigService access key authentication bypass via raw config file appId parsing
item.description: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system suitable for microservice configuration management scenarios. Prior to 2.5.2, Apollo ConfigService may allow unauthorized access to raw configuration data when AccessKey or management key authentic…

item.title: CVE-2026-45793 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Composer: Github Actions issued GITHUB_TOKEN disclosure in GitHub Actions logs
item.description: Composer is a dependency Manager for the PHP language. Prior to 1.10.28, 2.2.28, and 2.9.8, Composer\IO\BaseIO::loadConfiguration() validates GitHub OAuth tokens with the regex ^[.A-Za-z0-9_]+$ and interpolates rejected tokens into an UnexpectedValue…

item.title: CVE-2026-52842 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Lightpanda:URL parser misidentifies page origin for URLs containing @ in the path - Same-Origin Policy bypass
item.description: Lightpanda is a headless browser designed for AI and automation. Prior to 0.3.1, Lightpanda searched for @ across the entire URL string instead of only the authority component when computing a page origin, so a URL such as `http://attacker.com/@victi…

item.title: CVE-2026-52843 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Lightpanda: fetch() and XMLHttpRequest attach session cookies to cross-origin requests regardless of credentials mode
item.description: Lightpanda is a headless browser designed for AI and automation. Prior to 0.2.9, Lightpanda fetch() and XMLHttpRequest unconditionally attached session cookies to every HTTP request, ignoring credentials: omit, credentials: same-origin, credentials:…

item.title: CVE-2026-49997 · 5.4 MEDIUM — SurrealDB: Edge PERMISSIONS FOR delete bypassed when a connected node is deleted
item.description: SurrealDB is a scalable, distributed, collaborative, document-graph database for the realtime web. Prior to 3.1.0, Document::purge_edges in surrealdb/core/src/doc/delete.rs automatically removed graph edge records with permissions disabled through op…

item.title: CVE-2026-48799 · 7.7 HIGH — Postiz: Unauthenticated arbitrary lifetime PRO grant via Nowpayments webhook
item.description: Postiz is an AI social media scheduling tool. Prior to 2.21.8, Postiz fails to verify Nowpayments IPN callback authenticity against the payment provider shared secret and reads the target subscription identifier from the untrusted request body, allow…

item.title: CVE-2026-45804 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Diffusers: TOCTOU Trust Remote Code Bypass
item.description: Diffusers is the a library for pretrained diffusion models. Prior to 0.38.0, Diffusers' DiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained flow can bypass the trust_remote_code guard because download() validates model_index.json and custom pipeline code before later…

item.title: CVE-2026-47703 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — AdGuard Home: DoQ-to-UDP State Reduction and Source-Port Oracle
item.description: AdGuard Home is a network-wide software for blocking ads and tracking. Prior to 0.107.75, AdGuard Home's client-triggered DoQ forwarding path to a udp:// upstream reduced backend UDP DNS state by producing dns_id=0 or txid=0 and exposed a quoted-port…

item.title: CVE-2026-62685 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — File Browser: Colliding username normalization gives two users the same home directory
item.description: File Browser is a file managing interface for uploading, deleting, previewing, renaming, and editing files within a specified directory. Prior to 2.63.17, File Browser builds new user scopes from usernames passed through cleanUsername() when Signup=t…

item.title: CVE-2026-62843 · 6.8 MEDIUM — File Browser: Archive builder turns backslash filenames into path traversal (zip-slip)
item.description: File Browser is a file managing interface for uploading, deleting, previewing, renaming, and editing files within a specified directory. From 2.63.6 to 2.63.16, File Browser's archive builder uses strings.ReplaceAll(nameInArchive, "\", "/"), which tu…

item.title: CVE-2026-62683 · 3.1 LOW — File Browser: Trailing-slash delete leaves a stale public share behind
item.description: File Browser is a file managing interface for uploading, deleting, previewing, renaming, and editing files within a specified directory. Prior to 2.63.17, File Browser can leave a public directory share behind when the shared directory is deleted thr…

item.title: CVE-2026-55242 · 8.8 HIGH — ERPNext: Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) in Batch autonaming via Stock Settings.naming_series_prefix
item.description: ERPNext is a free and open source Enterprise Resource Planning tool. Prior to 15.111.0 and 16.22.0, an authenticated user with a standard operational role can trigger server-side template injection through a configuration field, resulting in unauthor…
